title: Jinja 3.1.6 Environments, Layouts, Autoescape, and Contracts · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved build trace contains one plausible source, path, encoding, metadata, parser, renderer, template, URL, asset, accessibility, security, cache, package, deployment, or release defect; locate the first failed boundary before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in strict autoescaped layout and component system and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggin…
objectives: Create one configured Jinja environment with bounded loader roots, explicit autoescape, StrictUndefined, deterministic globals, and version evidence.
Pass a documented immutable view model instead of filesystem objects, services, secrets, or unrestricted application state.
Use base layouts, blocks, includes, and macros with explicit ownership, required regions, naming, and bounded inheritance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Jinja Environment
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug publishing team handles case 7329 during a compromised-content recovery rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to configure strict autoescaped templates with explicit view-model and safe-markup boundaries; retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity; then zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Template Diagnostics
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: ssg-template-diagnostics-pobq1n" that uses case 5254 to configure strict autoescaped templates with explicit view-model and safe-markup boundaries. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native filesystem, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validator, browser, GitHub, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN, cache, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, CommonMark 0.31.2 fixtures, markdown-it-py 4.2.0, Jinja 3.1.6 strict autoescape, pytest 9.1.1, standards validators, real browsers, clean package installs, reproducible artifacts, staged deployment, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Template Diagnostics.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Template Diagnostics into observable performance evidence. For Static-site publishing and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Template Diagnostics, keep Template Diagnostics connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-template-diagnostics-pobq1n
# Competency: ssg-template-diagnostics.
# Case 5254: a multilingual public-service handbook migration.
# Operating constraint: retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity.
# Changed case: rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence.
def evidence_ssg_template_diagnostics_pobq1n(templates: int = 6, rendered: int = 6, autoescaped: bool = True, strict_undefined: bool = True, unsafe_safe_filters: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_pobq1n = "pobq1n-n1qbop-5254"
    assert evidence_variant_pobq1n
    evidence_axes_pobq1n = (
        "readerpobq1n",
        "source5254",
        "parsen1qbop",
        "routepobq1n5254",
        "artifact5254pobq1n",
        "recoveryn1qbop5254",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_pobq1n)) == 6
    if templates < 1 or rendered < 0:
        return False, rendered, "template-count"
    if rendered != templates:
        return False, rendered, "template-coverage"
    if not autoescaped or not strict_undefined:
        return False, rendered, "environment-policy"
    if unsafe_safe_filters > 0:
        return False, unsafe_safe_filters, "safe-boundary"
    assert rendered == templates
    return True, rendered, "strict-layout-system"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Template Diagnostics structural check is only one gate. strict autoescaped layout and component system must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
